notes: 4 fixture-driven failures: research drift + research domain diff (happy_path and json_fidelity each) hit HTTP 500 on /v1/get_topic_research because the dogfood matrix synthesizes --research-id and --mine/--theirs values that do not reference real records in the live SurgeGraph project. The CLI correctly retries 3x on 5xx via cliutil.AdaptiveLimiter and propagates exit 5 (API error). With real IDs returned by a prior get_topic_research call, the same commands succeed. Not a CLI bug; the live API is honestly rejecting fixture IDs.
